texto: A withered maple leaf has left its branch and is falling to the ground
autor: its movements resemble those of a butterfly in flight. Isn't it strange? The saddest and deadest of things is yet so like the gayest and most vital of creatures?
explicacao: Citação de its movements resemble those of a butterfly in flight. Isn't it strange?
